case_title: ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY vs. GEOFFREY CROMBIE et al

docket_entries.description: CASE TRANSFERRED TO AUTOMATION SYSTEM SEE PAPER REGISTER FOR PREVIOUS ACTIVITY
$14.00 PAID FOR DECLARATION AND ORDER TO ENTER JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT KERSIN HAAVIMB

JUDGE DIANE ELAN WICK, BFIELDS, REPORTER, BWILBER, CLERK 10:10 AM C/C FOR TRIAL BY COURT. PLAINTIFF DISMISSED ALISON PAGE AND MONICA PENNINGTON. PLTF WILL SETTLE THIS MATTER FOR THE SUM OF $1,500.00 TO BE PAID EQUALLY AND INDIVIDUALLY BY DEFENDANTS, GEOFFREY CROMBIE AND KERSTIN HAAVIMB AS FOLLOWS: $200.00 ON OR BEFORE 11/30/94 AND $200.00 ON OR BEFORE THE LAST CONSECUTIVE DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL A TOTAL SETTLEMENT BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. THE DEFT GEOFFREY CROMBIE PAY $750.00. PLAINTIFF TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GEOFFREY CROMBIE KERSIN HAAVIMB SUMMONS ISSUED
MEMO TO SET AND NOTICE OF COURT TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY COURT TRIAL SET FOR NOV-08-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEOFFREY CROMBIE $7,157.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,157.00, PER DECLARATION RE: DEFAULT OF DEFT. GEOFFREY CROMBIE.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT KERSIN HAAVIMB
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT GEOFFREY CROMBIE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEOFFREY CROMBIE KERSIN HAAVIMB ALLSTATE INSURANCE SETTLED MATTER FOR $1500.00 TO BE PAID EQUALLY BY AND INDIVIDUALLY BY DEFTS. GEOFFREY CROMBIE AND KERSTIN HAAVIMB. (DEFTS. ALISON P. PAGE AND MONICA PENNING- TON WERE DISMISSED W/PREJ) PAYMENTS TO BE MADE AS FOLLOWS: BOTH DEFTS. TO PAY $750.00 - TO BE RECEIVED AS FOLLOWS: $200.00 ON OR BEFORE NOV-30-94, AND $200.00 ON OR BEFORE THE LAST CONSECUTIVE DAY OF EACH CONSECUTIVE MONTH THERE- AFTER UNTIL A TOTAL SETTLEMENT BALANCE IS PAID IN FULL. IT IS FURTHER STIPULATED THAT UPON EACH PAYMENT OF THE SETTLEMENT IN FULL, ALLSTATE WILL FILE A DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE AS TO THE INDIVIDUAL DEFT. (SEE FILE FOR MORE DETAIL)
DECLARATION RE: DEFAULT ORDERING JUDGMENT TO BE ENTERED AGAINST GEOFFREY CROMBIE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ALLSTATE INSURANCE COMPANY
